name: admin-pakfasal
description: Admin web app for PakFasal (marketplace + learning). The **Flutter app** continues to read Firestore directly for public data; **all admin mutations** go through the Node API using the Firebase Admin SDK.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:4000/health && npm --prefix frontend run dev"
